title: Climate anxiety: What predicts it and how is it related to climate action?
authors: Lorraine Whitmarsh, Lois Player, Angelica Jiongco, Melissa James, Marc Williams, Elizabeth Marks, Patrick Kennedy-Williams

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: The paper studies climate anxiety and behavior, not a carbon or fuel tax.

inclusion_reason: UK survey on climate anxiety and pro-environmental behavior; it contains no direct analysis of carbon or fuel tax acceptability or support.
exclusion_reason: No carbon tax, fuel tax, or equivalent tax instrument is analyzed; the policy-relevant content is limited to pro-environmental behavior.
